name: Zeng Hsing Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Zeng Hsing Industrial Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells household sewing machines, vacuum cleaners, aluminum alloy die-castings, and vacuum cleaner related parts in Taiwan. It provides mechanical, computerized, combo, and overlock series, as well as accessories. In addition, the company designs and manufactures floor care products. It also exports and import its products. The company was formerly known as Shin Shing Sewing Machines Co. and changed its name to Zeng Hsing Industrial Co., Ltd. in January 1975. Zeng Hsing Industrial Co., Ltd. was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Taichung, Taiwan.
